---

I've created the Mintlify-style documentation for Pense STT. Here's the structure:

```
docs/
├── mint.json                 # Mintlify configuration
├── introduction.mdx          # Welcome page with overview
├── quickstart/
│   └── stt.mdx              # STT evaluation quickstart guide
└── images/
    ├── stt_1.png            # STT list page
    ├── stt_2.png            # Settings/provider selection
    ├── stt_3.png            # Dataset upload
    ├── stt_4.png            # Evaluation running
    ├── stt-leaderboard.png  # Leaderboard results
    └── stt-output.png       # Outputs view
```

**The STT quickstart guide includes:**

1. **Step 1: Navigate to STT Evaluations** - Shows the list page with screenshot
2. **Step 2: Configure Settings** - Language and provider selection with screenshot
3. **Step 3: Upload Your Dataset** - Manual upload and ZIP bulk upload options with screenshot
4. **Step 4: Run Evaluation** - Starting the evaluation with screenshot
5. **Step 5: View Results** - Outputs and Leaderboard tabs with screenshots
6. **Understanding the Metrics** - Table explaining WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge, TTFB, and Processing Time
7. **Best Practices** - Accordion section with tips for representative samples, edge cases, multi-language testing, and latency considerations

The documentation uses Mintlify components like `<Frame>`, `<Card>`, `<CardGroup>`, `<Accordion>`, `<Tip>`, and `<Info>` for a polished presentation.

I've updated both STT and TTS evaluation detail pages. Now when you navigate to a completed evaluation, it will automatically show the **Leaderboard** tab by default instead of the Outputs tab.

```typescript
// If already done, show leaderboard tab by default
if (result.status === "done") {
  setActiveTab("leaderboard");
}
```

This works in conjunction with the existing polling logic that switches to leaderboard when an in-progress evaluation completes.

---

I've created comprehensive Mintlify documentation for all Pense features. Here's the complete structure:

```
docs/
├── mint.json                    # Navigation configuration
├── introduction.mdx             # Overview with workflow guide
├── images/                      # Screenshots (STT only for now)
│   ├── stt_overview.png
│   ├── stt_new.png
│   ├── stt-dataset.png
│   ├── stt_outputs.png
│   └── stt_leaderboard.png
└── quickstart/
    ├── stt.mdx                  # STT evaluation guide
    ├── tts.mdx                  # TTS evaluation guide
    ├── agents.mdx               # Create and configure agents
    ├── tools.mdx                # Create custom tools
    ├── tests.mdx                # Create LLM tests
    ├── agent-tests.mdx          # Run tests on agents
    ├── benchmarks.mdx           # Compare LLM models
    ├── personas.mdx             # Define simulated users
    ├── scenarios.mdx            # Define conversation goals
    ├── metrics.mdx              # Define evaluation criteria
    └── simulations.mdx          # Run voice/text simulations
```

**Documentation includes:**

| Guide | Content |
|-------|---------|
| **TTS Evaluation** | Provider selection, text samples, CSV upload, leaderboard |
| **Agents** | System prompt, STT/TTS/LLM config, tools, settings |
| **Tools** | Parameter types, examples (lookup_customer, create_ticket) |
| **Tests** | Next Reply and Tool Call test types with examples |
| **Agent Tests** | Running tests, viewing results, past runs |
| **Benchmarks** | Model comparison, interpreting results |
| **Personas** | Characteristics, gender, language, interruption sensitivity |
| **Scenarios** | Task types (info seeking, task completion, issue resolution) |
| **Metrics** | Evaluation instructions, common metrics (tool_calls_accuracy, etc.) |
| **Simulations** | Chat vs Voice runs, transcript viewing, metric results |

**Screenshots needed:** You'll need to add screenshots for the new guides. Each guide has `<Frame>` placeholders referencing images like:
- `tts_overview.png`, `tts_new.png`, `tts_dataset.png`, etc.
- `agents_overview.png`, `agent_config.png`, `agent_tools.png`, etc.
- `tests_overview.png`, `test_next_reply.png`, `test_tool_call.png`, etc.
- `simulations_overview.png`, `simulation_config.png`, `simulation_results.png`, etc.

I've restructured the documentation into 4 main guides. Here's the new structure:

```
docs/
├── mint.json                 # Updated navigation
├── introduction.mdx          # Overview with workflow
├── images/                   # Screenshots (STT only for now)
└── guides/
    ├── stt.mdx              # 1. STT Evaluation (standalone)
    ├── tts.mdx              # 2. TTS Evaluation (standalone)
    ├── llm-testing.mdx      # 3. LLM Testing (comprehensive)
    └── simulations/         # 4. Simulations (with subpages)
        ├── overview.mdx     #    - Setup: agent, tool, personas, scenarios, metrics
        ├── text.mdx         #    - Text simulations: metrics, transcripts
        └── voice.mdx        #    - Voice simulations: latency metrics, audio
```

**Guide Structure:**

| Guide | Content |
|-------|---------|
| **STT** | Upload audio, select providers, run evaluation, view WER/latency metrics |
| **TTS** | Add text samples, select providers, run evaluation, listen to outputs |
| **LLM Testing** | Complete workflow: create agent → add tool → attach tool → create Next Reply test → run test → create Tool Invocation test → run test → attach tests to agent → run all tests → run benchmark |
| **Simulations** | **Overview**: Create agent with tool, create 2 personas (patient, frustrated), create 2 scenarios (refund, inquiry), create 2 metrics (tool_calls_accuracy, customer_satisfaction), create simulation<br/>**Text**: Run text simulation, view per-row metrics, view overall metrics, view transcripts<br/>**Voice**: Run voice simulation, view per-row metrics + latency (STT/LLM/TTS TTFB), view overall metrics + latency, view transcripts with audio playback |

**Screenshots needed:**
- STT: Already have images
- TTS: `tts_overview.png`, `tts_new.png`, `tts_dataset.png`, `tts_outputs.png`, `tts_leaderboard.png`
- LLM Testing: `agents_overview.png`, `agent_config.png`, `tool_create.png`, `agent_tools.png`, `test_next_reply.png`, `test_runner_result.png`, `test_tool_call.png`, `test_runner_tool.png`, `agent_tests_attached.png`, `agent_run_all.png`, `benchmark_select.png`, `benchmark_results.png`
- Simulations: `sim_agent_config.png`, `persona_patient.png`, `persona_frustrated.png`, `scenario_refund.png`, `metric_tools.png`, `simulation_config.png`, `sim_run_start.png`, `sim_text_progress.png`, `sim_text_results.png`, `sim_metric_hover.png`, `sim_overall_metrics.png`, `sim_transcript.png`, `sim_voice_start.png`, `sim_voice_progress.png`, `sim_voice_results.png`, `sim_voice_latency.png`, `sim_voice_overall.png`, `sim_voice_transcript.png`
